title: schoenoplectiella brachyceras

side_effects: Schoenoplectiella brachyceras can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems. Ingesting the plant's sap can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while prolonged exposure to its pollen may exacerbate conditions like asthma. The plant's root and stem extracts can also interact with certain medications, potentially leading to adverse reactions and organ damage.
